LAW AND MOTION 301, RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 664.6 & ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE UNOPPOSED MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL AND ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION IS GRANTED FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN IN THE MOVING PAPERS. PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE A PROPOSED JUDGMENT. A PROPOSED ORDER AND JUDGMENT HAVE BEEN SUBMITTED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Dismissal Under C.C.P. Section 664.6 & Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Notice Of Non-Compliance; Declaration Of Edgar B. Lopez; Notice Of Lodging; [Proposed] Order; [Proposed] Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-15-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Vacate Dismissal Under C.C.P. Section 664.6 & Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to vacate dismissal and enter judgment pursuant to stipulation is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. Plaintiff shall prepare a proposed judgment.

A proposed order and judgment have been submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
